hypothesis: Indie devs need an AI-powered landing page builder that converts 3x better than generic templates
target_user: Solo SaaS founders with limited marketing budget
problem: Most indie devs cannot afford a conversion rate optimization specialist and generic templates convert poorly
solution: AI-generated landing pages tuned per niche with built-in A/B test suggestions
mvp_scope: AI-generated landing page from brief input

landing_page_requirements.subheadline: AI-powered landing pages for indie hackers

market_truth.reason: Landing page builder market growing, but no AI-native solution for indie devs

risk_flags: Competitive market for landing page builders
